name: @goshippo/ai
description: Shippo's AI distribution surfaces: Claude Code plugin, ClawHub skill, and future provider channels.

scripts.sync: node scripts/inject-version.js && node scripts/sync.js && node scripts/compose-clawhub-digest.js && node scripts/build-clawhub-bundle.js
scripts.check-drift: git diff --quiet -- providers/ '.claude-plugin/' ':(exclude)providers/README.md' ':(exclude)providers/clawhub/skills/goshippo/SKILL.md.template' || (echo 'ERROR: providers/ differs from HEAD after sync. If you just edited canonical (skills/ or package.json), this is EXPECTED: commit the regenerated providers/ files with your canonical change. If you did not touch canonical, the committed mirrors were stale, run "npm run sync" and commit the result.' && exit 1)
scripts.test: npm run check-no-generated-edits && npm run sync && npm run validate-frontmatter && npm run check-drift && npm run check-tool-references
